ast.name: setDesc

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use this as the number of faces when it is omitted.
ast.target: 当未指定时使用此值作为面数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Determine the rounding behavior for dice results.
ast.target: 确定骰子结果的舍入行为。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Positive results will show a '+'. This setting has no effect on negative results.
ast.target: 正数结果将显示“+”。此设置对负数结果无效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Lookup table rolls will display the rolled number along with the result.
ast.target: 查表掷骰将同时显示掷出的数字和结果。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Randomly rolled sections will have a copy-content button to easy add result to clipboard.
ast.target: 随机掷出的区块将提供复制内容按钮，便于将结果添加到剪贴板。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enables random link rolling with the link parameter. Override by specifying a section type.
ast.target: 通过 link 参数启用随机链接掷骰。可通过指定区块类型覆盖。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 在文本和符号结果之间切换。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The dice view can always be opened using the command from the command palette.
ast.target: 可随时通过命令面板中的命令打开骰子视图。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Dice rolls from dice view will be displayed on screen.
ast.target: 骰子视图中的掷骰结果将显示在屏幕上。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Rendered dice will be varied colors based on the dice type. This will override manually set dice and text colors.
